attributes.Sql Query:
SEL
SIEURPH.ROLE_NAME AS BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME,
NIU.IAM_USER_KEY AS IAM_USER_KEY,
SIA.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY AS IAM_APPLICATION_KEY,
SIEURPH.ERP_SEGMENT1 AS BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID,
SIEURPH.ASSIGNMENT_TYPE AS ASSIGNMENT_TYPE,
SIEURPH.DATA_RES_EXPT_FLAG AS STANDARD_OR_EXCEPTION_FLG,
SIEURPH.EXCL_RESTR_FLAG AS EXCLUSIVE_OR_RESTRICTIVE_FLG,
CASE WHEN SIEURPH.STATUS='A' THEN 'N'
 WHEN  SIEURPH.STATUS='I' THEN 'Y' END  SOURCE_DELETED_FLG,
SIEURPH.LVL_NUMBER AS IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
 'I'	ACTION_CODE,
CASE WHEN NURPHP.BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID IS NOT NULL AND
NURPHP.BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME IS NOT NULL AND
NURPHP.IAM_USER_KEY IS NOT NULL AND
NURPHP.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY IS NOT NULL
 THEN 'U' ELSE 'I' END DML_TYPE 
FROM 
(SEL
SIEURPH.ROLE_NAME ,
SIEURPH.ERP_SEGMENT1,
SIEURPH.ASSIGNMENT_TYPE,
SIEURPH.DATA_RES_EXPT_FLAG,
SIEURPH.EXCL_RESTR_FLAG,
SIEURPH.STATUS ,
SIEURPH.LVL_NUMBER,
SIEURPH.UPDATE_DATE,
SIEURPH.TOOL_ID,
SIEURPH.IAM_USER_ID
 FROM 
$$STGDB.ST_IAM_EDWTD_USR_ROL_PRD_HR SIEURPH
UNION
SEL
SIEURPH.ROLE_NAME ,
SIEURPH.ERP_SEGMENT1,
SIEURPH.ASSIGNMENT_TYPE,
SIEURPH.DATA_RES_EXPT_FLAG,
SIEURPH.EXCL_RESTR_FLAG,
SIEURPH.STATUS ,
SIEURPH.LVL_NUMBER,
SIEURPH.UPDATE_DATE,
SIEURPH.TOOL_ID,
SIEURPH.IAM_USER_ID
 FROM 
$$EXCEPDB.EX_IAM_USR_ROLE_PRD_HIER_PF SIEURPH ) SIEURPH
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.IAM_APPLICATION_CTRL  IAC
ON (SIEURPH.TOOL_ID=IAC.TOOL_ID AND IAC.STATUS ='A')
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT_FAMILY NPF			
ON SIEURPH.ERP_SEGMENT1 = NPF.BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID
INNER JOIN $$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_ROLE NIR
ON SIEURPH.ROLE_NAME=NIR.BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME
INNER JOIN $$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_USER NIU
ON NIU.SK_IAM_USER_ID_INT = SIEURPH.IAM_USER_ID 
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_IAM_APPLICATION SIA
ON SIEURPH.TOOL_ID=SIA.SK_APPLICATION_ID_INT
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_PRODUCT_FAMILY_LINK  NURPHP
ON(
NURPHP.BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID = NPF.BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID  AND
NURPHP.BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME = SIEURPH.ROLE_NAME AND
NURPHP.IAM_USER_KEY = NIU.IAM_USER_KEY AND
NURPHP.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY = SIA.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY)
WHERE  SIEURPH.LVL_NUMBER = 3
 QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY SIEURPH.ROLE_NAME,SIEURPH.IAM_USER_ID, SIA.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY,SIEURPH.ERP_SEGMENT1
   ORDER BY SIEURPH.UPDATE_DATE  DESC) = 1

SEL
SIEURPH.IAM_USER_ID,                   
SIEURPH.ROLE_ID,                       
SIEURPH.ROLE_NAME,                     
SIEURPH.TOOL_ID ,                      
SIEURPH.DATA_STRUCT_TYPE,              
SIEURPH.LVL_NUMBER,                   
SIEURPH.ERP_SEGMENT1,                  
SIEURPH.ASSIGNMENT_TYPE ,              
SIEURPH.DATA_RES_EXPT_FLAG,            
SIEURPH.EXCL_RESTR_FLAG,               
SIEURPH.RESTRICTION_FLAG ,             
SIEURPH.PROXY_FLAG,                    
SIEURPH.GRANTOR_UNIVERSAL_ID,          
SIEURPH.GRANTOR_CEC_ID,                
SIEURPH.GRANTOR_CCO_ID,                
SIEURPH.STATUS,                        
SIEURPH.TR_FLAG ,                      
SIEURPH.LAST_ACTION ,                  
SIEURPH.CREATED_BY ,                   
SIEURPH.CREATE_DATE,                 
SIEURPH.UPDATED_BY,                    
SIEURPH.UPDATE_DATE,                   
SIEURPH.ACTION_CODE,                   
SIEURPH.BATCH_ID,                      
SIEURPH.CREATE_DATETIME,       
'RI' AS EXCEPTION_TYPE               
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_IAM_EDWTD_USR_ROL_PRD_HR SIEURPH
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.IAM_APPLICATION_CTRL IAC
ON (SIEURPH.TOOL_ID=IAC.TOOL_ID AND IAC.STATUS ='A')
WHERE  SIEURPH.LVL_NUMBER = 3 AND (
NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT_FAMILY NPF
WHERE  SIEURPH.ERP_SEGMENT1 = NPF.BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID)
OR  NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM $$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_ROLE NIR
WHERE SIEURPH.ROLE_NAME=NIR.BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME )
OR  NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM $$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_USER NIU
WHERE NIU.SK_IAM_USER_ID_INT = SIEURPH.IAM_USER_ID )
OR NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_IAM_APPLICATION SIA
WHERE SIEURPH.TOOL_ID=SIA.SK_APPLICATION_ID_INT))
